revision.comment: Changed protection settings for "[[Template:Switcher]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 2505 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite) [Move=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite))
revision.text:

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{ safesubst:#if:{{{2|}}}|
{{{1|}}}{{safesubst:#if:trim|{{{2|}}}}}
}}{{ safesubst:#if:{{{4|}}}|
{{{3|}}}{{safesubst:#if:trim|{{{4|}}}}}
}}{{ safesubst:#if:{{{6|}}}|
{{{5|}}}{{safesubst:#if:trim|{{{6|}}}}}
}}{{ safesubst:#if:{{{8|}}}|
